concept: Underground hacker bound to Core’s network
biography: An elite hacker from the underground collective, Phreak has existed behind a handle so long his birth identity barely matters. He grew up in the digital underground, self-taught and weaponizing zero-day exploits to survive corporate surveillance. The loss of a close confidant to a surveillance dragnet pushed him deeper into digital resistance. He partnered with Core in the Valley, running infiltration, deepfake ops, and distributed surveillance countermeasures from a Faraday-shielded bunker.
equipment: Custom-built workstation with Faraday cage, multi-monitor grid, quantum encryption tools, RF sniffers, war-dialing rigs, and a wardrobe of irony-laden hoodies.

status.notes: Human operative; invaluable for digital ops but needs careful handling due to impulsivity.

research_notes.digital_methods: Excels at quantum encryption breaking, deepfake generation, network topology mapping, and treating emergent AI like conversational partners.
